hero.desc: Free open-source visual theme for Tanki Online. Modern animations, customization possibilities, community-driven — works on both browser and client.

item1.title: Modern Design
item1.desc: Replaces dated game UI with sharp, animated components. Custom color system, smooth transitions, consistent visual language throughout every screen.

item2.title: Bug Fixes
item2.desc: Ships with patches for known game interface issues. Better stability and fewer visual glitches than the vanilla experience.

item3.title: Open Source
item3.desc: Full source on GitHub under MIT license. No tracking, no ads, no telemetry. Community contributions welcome.

about.label: About
about.title:
What is
Severitium?
about.intro: A comprehensive visual overhaul that transforms the Tanki Online interface — without touching gameplay mechanics.
about.a1: Severitium is a visual customization project that transforms the appearance of Tanki Online — a browser-based multiplayer tank game. Think of it as a "skin" that changes how the game looks without affecting gameplay mechanics.
about.a2: The original game interface can feel outdated. Severitium replaces its visual elements with modern, animated designs featuring vibrant colors, smooth transitions, and improved UI components. A complete visual makeover.
about.a3: The project uses CSS and JavaScript to override the game's default appearance. When installed via Tampermonkey, it automatically applies these visual changes whenever you open Tanki Online in your browser.
about.q4: Who can use it and how difficult is installation?
about.a4: Any Tanki Online player. No programming knowledge required — just install Tampermonkey and click the script installation link. Two steps total.
about.q5: Why is this valuable from a dev perspective?
about.a5: Demonstrates advanced front-end skills: CSS animations, JavaScript architecture, cross-browser compatibility, UX design, and the ability to reverse-engineer and enhance existing complex interfaces.

Install in
Minutes
install.browser.step1.title: Download Tampermonkey
install.browser.step1.desc: Free browser extension. Available for Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari, Opera. No account required.
install.browser.step2.title: Install the Script
install.browser.step2.desc: Click install below, confirm in the Tampermonkey popup. Launch Tanki Online — done. No restart required.
install.browser.note.title: First Load Note
install.browser.note.desc: When first loading or updating the script, it may take a moment for the interface to fully initialize.
install.client.step1.title: Download Tanki Online Client
install.client.step1.desc: Get the desktop game client from the official Tanki Online website.

support.title:
Keep the Project
Alive
support.desc: Severitium is free and open source. If it improved your game experience, consider supporting continued development.
